caption: A simulated football game takes place on a green field marked with white yard lines and numbers. In the initial scene, players in white and black uniforms line up across the center of the field. On-screen text at the top displays "1st & 10", "EXO", and a game clock at "1:54 15 :17". A small inset video window in the lower-left corner shows a man with blonde hair wearing a dark shirt. As the play begins, the offensive and defensive lines clash in a scrum near the center. A player labeled "Bledsoe" with a green marker stands behind the line of scrimmage, while another player is labeled "Smith". The perspective then shifts to a closer angle, showing the black-clad quarterback dropping back to pass. He is positioned near the "0" yard marker, while white-clad defenders rush toward him from the opposite side of the field.
